title: Standard Naval Letter
description: The standard format for correspondence within the Department of the Navy.

title: Business Letter
description: Correspondence with non-DoD entities, agencies, or individuals.

title: New-Page Endorsement
description: Used to forward a basic letter with comments, recommendations, or new information.

title: Memorandum for the Record
description: Internal document used to record events, decisions, or conversations.

title: NAVMC 10274 (AA Form)
description: Administrative Action Form used for personnel requests.

title: Position/Decision Paper
description: Used to advocate for a specific position or decision.

title: Information Paper
description: Provides factual information in concise terms.

title: From-To Memorandum
description: Informal internal correspondence.

title: Letterhead Memorandum
description: Formal memorandum on command letterhead.

title: Memorandum of Agreement
description: Agreement between parties (Conditional).

title: Memorandum of Understanding
description: General understanding between parties (Non-binding).

title: Marine Corps Order
description: Permanent directive establishing policy.

title: Marine Corps Bulletin
description: Directive of duration less than 12 months.

title: Page 11 - Promotion Not Recommended
description: Standard entry for when a Marine is eligible but not recommended for promotion.

title: Page 11 - Promotion Recommended
description: Standard entry for when a Marine is recommended for promotion.

title: Page 11 - 6105 Warning (Not Processing)
description: Standard 6105 counseling entry for deficiencies (not currently being processed).

title: Page 11 - 6105 Processing Entry
description: 6105 counseling entry when already being processed for judicial or adverse admin action.

title: Page 11 - Illegal Drug Involvement
description: Mandatory entry for illegal drug use per MCO 5300.17A / MCO 1900.16 CH 2.

title: Page 11 - Alcohol Abuse
description: Entry for alcohol-related incident per MCO 5300.17A.

title: Page 11 - BCP Assignment
description: Assignment to Body Composition Program per MCO 6110.3A.

title: Page 11 - Voluntary Retirement (Officer)
description: Officer retirement request per MCO 1900.16 CH 2.

title: Page 11 - Resignation (Officer)
description: Officer resignation request per MCO 1900.16 CH 2 para 5003.

title: Page 11 - VSI/SSB Separation
description: Voluntary Separation Incentive or Special Separation Benefit acknowledgment.

title: Page 11 - Hostile Fire Area Waiver (OCD)
description: Overseas Control Date waiver for hostile fire assignment per MCO 1300.8 W/CH 1.

title: Page 11 - Sole Surviving Son/Daughter Waiver
description: Waiver of restrictive assignment rights per MCO 1300.8 W/CH 1.

title: Page 11 - PRP Preliminary Screening
description: Personnel Reliability Program preliminary screening per SECNAVINST 5510.35D.

title: Page 11 - PRP Permanent Decertification
description: Personnel Reliability Program permanent decertification per SECNAVINST 5510.35D.

title: DLA Standard Memorandum
description: Standard memorandum format per DLA Correspondence Manual (2011).

title: DLA Business Letter
description: Business letter format for DLA correspondence with non-DoD entities.

title: DLA Memorandum - Full Test
description: Comprehensive DLA memorandum with all fields: suspense date, FOUO, THROUGH, references, attachments, cc, and all subparagraph levels.

title: DLA Business Letter - Full Test
description: Comprehensive DLA business letter with all fields: suspense date, FOUO, recipient address, references, enclosures, and cc.

title: I-Type Technical Publication - Test Template
description: USMC technical publication template with sample data for all elements.

title: AA Form - Third POV Authorization
description: Request authorization of a third privately owned vehicle. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - Alternate Separation Site
description: Request separation at a site other than the normal processing location. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH Advanced Family Member Travel
description: Request BAH in conjunction with advanced family member travel. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH Change of Designated Place
description: Request BAH for relocation of dependents to a designated place. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH DDT Waiver Extension
description: Request extension of an existing BAH waiver for delayed dependent travel. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH Delay of Dependent Travel
description: Request a BAH waiver in conjunction with delayed dependent travel. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH DDT (Deployment)
description: Request BAH with delayed dependent travel due to an upcoming deployment. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH PME/Training Waiver
description: Request a BAH PME waiver for school or training moves. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - BAH Retention (Low-Cost PCS)
description: Request BAH retention for a low-cost or proximity PCS move. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - COT Incentive
description: Request to execute the Consecutive Overseas Tour incentive. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - Circuitous Travel
description: Request circuitous travel in conjunction with PCS. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - Early Return of Dependents
description: Request early return of dependents from an overseas station. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - Excess Baggage Reimbursement
description: Request reimbursement of excess baggage expenses in conjunction with PCS. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - PCA/LCPCS to Fully Funded PCSO
description: Request conversion of PCA/low-cost PCS orders to fully funded PCS orders. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - IPCOT Incentive
description: Request to execute the In-Place Consecutive Overseas Tour incentive. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - OTEIP Incentive Change
description: Request a change to an elected Overseas Tour Extension Incentive. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - OTEIP Incentive Funding
description: Request Overseas Tour Extension Incentive Program funding. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - TAD in Excess of 180 Days
description: Request authorization of TAD exceeding 180 days. Routes to CMC (MMIB-3).

title: AA Form - Reserve O6-Level SgtMaj Slate (Request)
description: Request consideration for the Reserve O6-level Sergeant Major slate. Routes to CMC (MMOA).

title: AA Form - Reserve O6-Level SgtMaj Slate (Decline)
description: Request NOT to be considered for the Reserve O6-level Sergeant Major slate. Routes to CMC (MMOA).

title: AA Form - Reserve 1stSgt/SgtMaj Billet Acceptance
description: Statement of intent to accept a Reserve First Sergeant or Sergeant Major billet. Routes to CMC (MMOA).

title: AA Form - CONUS 12-Month Extension
description: Officer 12-month CONUS tour extension. Use maximum approved abbreviations (MCO P1070.12K sec 6002); Via lists endorsing units, not the destination. Routes to CMC (MMOA-1).

title: AA Form - OCONUS 12-Month Extension
description: Officer 12-month overseas tour extension. Use maximum approved abbreviations (MCO P1070.12K sec 6002); Via lists endorsing units, not the destination. Routes to CMC (MMOA-1).

title: AA Form - 12-Month TOS Waiver
description: Officer time-on-station waiver. Use maximum approved abbreviations (MCO P1070.12K sec 6002); spell the unit address in full in Organization/Station. Routes to CMC (MMOA-1).

title: AA Form - 12-Month Tour Curtailment
description: Officer overseas tour curtailment. Use maximum approved abbreviations (MCO P1070.12K sec 6002); Via lists endorsing units, not the destination. Routes to CMC (MMOA-1).

title: Page 11 - Redesignation to First Sergeant
description: OBS counseling entry for redesignation to First Sergeant.
